title: No Gui Chest
description: You can use a new chest and hopper without GUI!
body:
**_Let's remove the GUI and see something more immersive!_**

When lid is not open, you can right-click the top of the chest to open the lid.
Items will appear in the chest！
Right click on the item in Chest to swap it with the item in your hand.
Right click on the other side to close the lid.

**_Of course, you can still use GUI_**

When Chest is not open, you can right-click on all faces of Chest to open the GUI,
except for the top, which is used to open the lid.
 
**_Some possible issues_**

If the model of the item is too large, it will block other items, such as the Dragon Head.

A regular Chest has 27 slots, but it's not easy to arrange them into long squares, so I only rendered 25, and I chose not to render the other two.

Other block?
Creating.
Completed：chest、hopper、brewing table、dropper、dispenser.
